positive: A vibrant, abstract composition featuring interconnected geometric shapes forming a stylized celestial map. Use a palette of deep sapphire blue, neon magenta, and electric gold. The style should be crisp, clean, and highly symmetrical, reminiscent of modern stained glass or vaporwave art.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, organic lines, messy, grunge
